meaning: be involved in a crash; (have an) accident
sentence: 那架飞机在海上失事了。
pinyin: Nà jià fēijī zài hǎi shàng shīshì le.
english: That airplane crashed over the sea.

sentence: 他的医保已经交满一年了。
pinyin: Tā de yī bǎo yǐjīng jiāo mǎn yī nián le.
english: His medical insurance has already been paid for a full year.

pinyin: Kèhù gāng fā lái yī zhāng dìng dān.
english: The client just sent over an order.

pinyin: Bèigào rén dāngtíng jùjué rèn zuì.
english: The defendant refused to plead guilty in court.

sentence: 比赛的结局真的很戏剧性。
pinyin: Bǐsài de jiéjú zhēn de hěn xìjù xìng.
english: The ending of the match was truly dramatic.
